title: trifolium calycinum
intro: Trifolium calycinum, also known as the rose clover, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of rose clover include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Rose clover is typically prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
